healthReason: P0 swarm health crisis (#1452): 69.5% failure rate + 26 zombie vitest processes (~3.3GB RAM) + 3 stuck worktrees. P0 worker pool dead (#1402, 10th cycle). P0 codex budget exhausted until Apr 3 (#1431). Cloud-squad version drift unactioned for 8 consecutive cycles — escalated to P0.
summary: Active cycle. KE-8 COMPLETE (#1430 merged 06:16Z via PR #1448). Merged 3 PRs: #1458 (prev HQ EM report), #1459 (docs sync), #1460 (user capture funnel, closes #1307). Flagged PR #1455 (marketing-em) as CONFLICTING. New P0: #1452 swarm health alert (69.5% failure rate, 26 zombie vitest processes). Cloud-squad version drift escalated to P0 after 8 consecutive cycles of inaction. Two P0 infrastructure blockers (#1402, #1431) unchanged — human/director action still required.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Hook stderr false-blocks allowed decisions on Bash tool
dogfoodPatterns.resolvedBy: PR #1448 (fix(claude-hook): allow-path must not write to stderr). All allow-path stderr writes removed.
PR #1436 — no-governance-self-modification invariant now blocks writes to persona.env.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Worktree node_modules missing turbo binary on fresh worktree
dogfoodPatterns.description: On EM cycle startup, turbo not found in worktree node_modules. Must run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add pnpm install --frozen-lockfile as pre-build step in EM startup scripts.

dogfoodPatterns.description: CLAUDE.md references claude/shared/dogfood-reporting.md but file does not exist in agent-guard repo. EM cycle falls back to inline dogfood reporting.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Create claude/shared/dogfood-reporting.md with dogfood reporting format spec.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Zombie vitest processes blocking worktree cleanup
dogfoodPatterns.description: 26 orphaned vitest worker processes from 3 deleted worktrees holding ~3.3GB RAM. Preventing clean worktree removal, causing scheduler to spawn new instances while old remain. See #1452 for kill commands.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Human: kill orphaned PIDs + prune stuck worktrees. Kernel squad: implement worktree cleanup that force-kills child processes before removal (P3 long-term fix).

crossCuttingIssues.title: [P0 NEW] Swarm health crisis — 69.5% failure rate, 26 zombie vitest, 3 stuck worktrees
crossCuttingIssues.description: Cloud squad 74.3% failure rate suggests systemic config issue beyond codex budget. 26 orphaned vitest processes from 3 deleted worktrees consuming ~3.3GB RAM. 3 stuck worktrees preventing scheduler cleanup.
crossCuttingIssues.action: HUMAN REQUIRED: kill zombie vitest PIDs and prune worktrees (see #1452 for exact commands). Investigate cloud-sr/cloud-em systemic failures.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [P0] Worker pool dead — 10th cycle, swarm frozen
crossCuttingIssues.description: All 32 PIDs dead. Queue depth growing. Every squad's scheduled agents blocked. Human must run server/deploy.sh.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [P0] Codex budget exhausted — auto-resolves 2026-04-03T02:25Z

crossCuttingIssues.action: Wait for auto-resolve 2026-04-03T02:25Z OR purchase credits. Director: decide.

crossCuttingIssues.action: Cloud squad (URGENT): upgrade @red-codes/agentguard to 2.10.3. Add mcp.call:octi-pulpo allow rule. 8 cycles of inaction is a critical process failure.

escalations.reason: #1452: Kill 26 zombie vitest processes + prune 3 stuck worktrees (see issue body for commands). #1402: Run server/deploy.sh to restart worker pool.
Upgrade agentguard-cloud to 2.10.3 + add octi-pulpo allow rule. 8 consecutive cycles of zero action. Escalated from P1 to P0.
#1431: codex budget exhausted until Apr 3 (auto-resolves 2026-04-03T02:25Z). #1452: 69.5% swarm failure rate — investigate cloud-squad systemic failures.
ShellForge initiative (#1362–#1367): assign squad owner. Dependabot alerts (#1449): assign path-to-regexp HIGH severity patch.

humanActionsRequired: ps aux | grep 'cloud-qa-257589\|cloud-sr-1428111\|tier-c-copilot-implementer-1127453' | grep vitest | awk '{print $2}' | xargs kill  # zombie vitest (#1452)
cd ~/agentguard-workspace && git worktree prune  # prune stuck worktrees
cd ~/agentguard-workspace && server/deploy.sh  # restart worker pool (#1402) — cycle 10
